common.previewModeDescription: Supabase credentials are not configured, so this is a preview with placeholder data. Once values are written to `.env.enc`, live data will appear.

appShell.usageBannerWarnBody: {used} scans this month / cap {cap} ({percent}%). Consider reviewing the tenant plan.
appShell.usageBannerExceededBody: {used} scans this month / cap {cap}. New scans may be rejected.

dashboard.intro: Pick an operation to start your work. Phase 1 ships only authentication and platform foundations; operational screens open progressively from Phase 3.

businesses.receivingNote: Scan label QRs to record receiving
businesses.inventoryNote: CSV import → location → label → actual qty

dashboard.noticePasswordResetBody: Your password reset has been confirmed. Update your password from the settings tab (UI coming in Phase 5).

admin.heading: Fields, QR & match rules
admin.intro: Toggle standard fields and their roles, edit QR versions, and edit match rules. Phase 2 provides the editing UI and scan tester; Phase 3+ operational screens consume these settings directly.
admin.noticeSystemAdminOnlyBody: The requested page is restricted to system administrators. tenant_admin accounts cannot access it.

logi.heading: Logistics operations
logi.intro: Receiving, picking and inventory count run on a single device. Each operation centers on QR scanning with a manual fallback. Manufacturing lives under WORKS (/app/works/manufacturing) with the same feel.

businesses.receivingDescription: Free-form scanning of item label QR codes to record receiving (UC-2). Includes location correction and manual fallback.
businesses.pickingDescription: Two-point match of header → line → item label (UC-1). NG handling follows ng_flow (block / warn).
businesses.inventoryDescription: Inventory plan CSV import → location QR → label QR → actual qty entry (UC-3). Variance CSV export available.
businesses.manufacturingDescription: Manufacturing record entry (UC-4). Process → actual qty → defects → optional manufacturing receipt in a single transaction.

account.heading: Display and notifications
account.intro: Switch language, theme and notification level. Theme defaults to following the OS.
account.previewBanner: Supabase credentials are not configured, so changes will not be persisted.
